title: Autoload File Generation Flow
main_entry_point: AutoloadGenerator::dump(Config, InstalledRepositoryInterface, RootPackageInterface, InstallationManager, string $targetDir, bool $scanPsrPackages, ?string $suffix, ?Locker $locker)
activity_flow: Compute path codes: vendorPathCode, appBaseDirCode, vendorPathToTargetDirCode
AutoloadGenerator::parseAutoloads(packageMap, rootPackage, filteredDevPackages) → autoloads{psr-0, psr-4, classmap, files, exclude-from-classmap}
FOR each dir in autoloads['classmap']: ClassMapGenerator::scanPaths(dir, exclusionRegex)
[scanPsrPackages?] FOR each psr-4 / psr-0 namespace+paths: ClassMapGenerator::scanPaths(dir, exclusionRegex, type, namespace)
Resolve $suffix: config 'autoloader-suffix' → existing autoload.php hash → locker hash → random
└─ getStaticFile: creates new ClassLoader(), loads namespaces+psr4+classmap, serializes to ComposerStaticInit{suffix} class with $files, $prefixLengthsPsr4, etc.
└─ getAutoloadFile: emits autoload.php that require_once autoload_real.php then calls ComposerAutoloaderInit{suffix}::getLoader()
└─ getAutoloadRealFile: emits ComposerAutoloaderInit{suffix} class with getLoader() + composerRequire/Closure-based requireFile
getAutoloadRealFile_flow: append: spl_autoload_register loadClassLoader (prepend) → new ClassLoader(__DIR__) → spl_autoload_unregister
[useIncludeFiles?] append: $filesToLoad = ComposerStaticInit{suffix}::$files; Closure::bind requireFile loop; foreach $filesToLoad → requireFile($fileIdentifier, $file)

composerRequire_function.location: bottom of AutoloadGenerator.php (namespace-level function in Composer\Autoload)
composerRequire_function.note: Prevents double-loading of autoload 'files' entries. Used as fallback (non-static-loader path) or as standalone function in older-style autoload_real.php

requireFile_closure.logic: Same guard as composerRequire: check $GLOBALS['__composer_autoload_files'][$fileIdentifier] → set true → require $file

includeFile_includeIfExists_note: These are referenced as key elements. In the generated autoload_real.php, the Closure-bound $requireFile serves as 'includeFile'. 'includeIfExists' pattern appears in older fixture variants (autoload_real_include_path.php, autoload_real_target_dir.php) where a function checks file_exists before require.
key_output_files: vendor/composer/autoload_static.php — ComposerStaticInit{suffix} with static maps + getInitializer()
key_relationships: AutoloadGenerator depends_on ClassMapGenerator (scan + build class map)
AutoloadGenerator depends_on Filesystem (write files, path resolution)
AutoloadGenerator depends_on ClassLoader (instantiated inside getStaticFile to resolve maps)
autoload_real.php getLoader() calls ComposerStaticInit::getInitializer() to populate ClassLoader
composerRequire() function guards file inclusion via $GLOBALS['__composer_autoload_files']
conditions_and_branches: classMapAuthoritative → forces scanPsrPackages, adds $loader->setClassMapAuthoritative(true) in real file
scanPsrPackages → additional ClassMapGenerator::scanPaths() over psr-0/psr-4 dirs
devMode → skip filtering dev packages from packageMap
dryRun → return ClassMap before writing any files
checkPlatform → emit platform_check.php and require it in autoload_real.php
useIncludeFiles (autoload_files.php exists) → emit requireFile loop in autoload_real.php
targetDir + psr-0 → emit custom targetDirLoader autoload() method in real file
suffix null → auto-detect from existing autoload.php or locker or random bytes
